title: Senior SAP IBP Consultant / Solution Architect – Planning & Integration
raw_description:
Summary
We are seeking a Senior SAP IBP Consultant / Solution Architect to lead design and optimization of advanced planning processes in SAP IBP within a global transformation program for a Pharmaceutical Manufacturer. The role includes ownership of solution architecture, stakeholder management, and delivery of scalable planning solutions integrated with S/4HANA and cloud technologies.


Tasks & Responsibilities
Lead end-to-end design of SAP IBP solutions (Demand, Supply, S&OP, OBP)
Define architecture and integration concepts (RTI, CI-DS, SDI, APIs)
Conduct requirement assessments and facilitate workshops with business stakeholders
Configure and optimize planning areas, key figures, attributes, and time profiles
Provide guidance to junior consultants and technical teams
Analyze complex planning or integration issues and design sustainable solutions
Ensure documentation quality and knowledge transfer
Support roadmap planning and continuous improvement initiative


Required Skills & Ex

title: SAP Instructor - SAP SAC
raw_description:
My client is in need of a German speaking SAP SAC expert who is capable of giving consultant-level training. These are existing official SAP courses created by SAP so there is no development of materials required by you, just a bit of preparation time required. It is likely to be no more than 5 days duration and ideally towards the end of May but the dates can be flexible. Ideally you should have some level of SAP training experience even if it is only at user-level to be sure that this is something you are capable of but you do need to be of a Senior level within SAP SAC. Not all great consultants make great trainers so you must be sure of your knoweldge transfer ability. 
You would be provided with all materials and a preparation system in advance to give you time to practice the exercises. If it goes well it will almost certainly lead to repeat work in the future. 
If you are reading this but don't have SAC knowledge but instead specialise in other areas of SAP, please feel free to
score_reason: Good SAC expertise and short duration, but agency posting and unclear remote arrangement limits score.
